raw_consumer_statement:
My Citibank credit card was stolen and used fraudulently for XXXX XXXX 
On XX/XX/2025. My application for a CITI credit card was approved, and it is a company-issued corporate card. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, my card has still not been received. However, couple unauthorised big transactions suddenly appear. I immediately clicked on the button from the CITI email - " I don't recognize one or more of the transactions ''. I also ask to replace a new card on the CITI manager app. The message said CITI will call me and until then, the transactions will not be approved. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I found there is a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX transaction to " XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX '' was actually Approved. I called the CITI about the issue and blocked the card. I also filed the dispute on this transaction and waiting for reply. 
Overall, I have never received this credit card, and someone stole my card, activated the card, and made few big transactions in my area.
